---
title: "MiniSpec"
sidebar: modules
---

## Overview

::: {.panel-tabset}

### 🇬🇧 English

{{< include ../../src/MiniSpec/README.md >}}

### 🇪🇸 Español

{{< include ../../src/MiniSpec/README.es.md >}}

:::

---

::: {.panel-tabset}

### 🇬🇧 English

{{< include ../../src/MiniSpec/docs/GUIDE.md >}}

### 🇪🇸 Español

{{< include ../../src/MiniSpec/docs/GUIDE.es.md >}}

:::

---

## Testing Patterns

::: {.panel-tabset}

### 🇬🇧 English

### 🇪🇸 Español

:::
